findings.description: Direct contradiction: Overview says all stages run in parallel; Stage 2 says Stage 2 must complete before Stage 3 begins.
findings.evidence: Overview: "All pipeline stages run in parallel to maximize throughput." Stage 2: "Stage 2 must complete before Stage 3 begins."
findings.suggestion: Fix Overview to accurately characterize the execution model.

findings.description: Authentication mechanism is unspecified. 'Authentication is used to verify each request' provides no actionable information.
findings.evidence: "Authentication is used to verify each request before processing begins." — no mechanism named.
findings.suggestion: Specify the authentication method (e.g., Bearer token/JWT, HMAC-signed requests, mTLS).

findings.description: 'The pipeline and workflow are monitored' — 'and workflow' is redundant since the pipeline is the workflow being described.
findings.evidence: "The pipeline and workflow are monitored by the on-call team via the Prometheus dashboard."
findings.suggestion: "The pipeline is monitored by the on-call team via the Prometheus dashboard."

findings.description: The document alternates between precise technical language and vague placeholders, signaling unfinished sections.
findings.evidence: Precise: "deduplicates events within a 5-minute window using a Redis cache." Vague: "Authentication is used to verify each request." and "Transformation applies the standard retry policy."
findings.suggestion: Bring authentication and retry policy descriptions to the same level of specificity as other sections.
